title: Account access support
content: If a user cannot log in, confirm credentials, check password reset flow, and verify the account is active.

title: Billing support
content: For billing issues, confirm the billing period, payment status, and whether the invoice or subscription needs review.

title: Platform error handling
content: For app errors, ask for the failing action, error message, time of issue, and whether the behavior is reproducible.

title: Pricing overview
content: Sales conversations should explain available plans, pricing value, onboarding scope, and suitable next steps.

title: Demo requests
content: For demo requests, qualify company need, desired use case, timeline, and preferred contact path.

title: Upgrade conversations
content: Upgrade discussions should highlight feature fit, current plan gaps, expected outcomes, and procurement requirements.
